query: SELECT neighborhood, COUNT(DISTINCT categoryId) as categorias_distintas, COUNT(*) as total FROM establishments WHERE neighborhood IN ('Pinheiros', 'Moema', 'Bela Vista', 'Liberdade', 'Consolação', 'Vila Madalena') GROUP BY neighborhood ORDER BY total DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT neighborhood, COUNT(DISTINCT categoryId) as categorias_distintas, COUNT(*) as total FROM establishments WHERE neighborhood IN ('Pinheiros', 'Moema', 'Bela Vista', 'Liberdade', 'Consolação', 'Vila Madalena') GROUP BY neighborhood ORDER BY total DESC;
